verses.latin_vulgate: Josue senex provectæque ætatis erat, et dixit Dominus ad eum : Senuisti, et longævus es, terraque latissima derelicta est, quæ necdum sorte divisa est :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וִיהוֹשֻׁ֣עַ זָקֵ֔ן בָּ֖א בַּיָּמִ֑ים וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֵלָ֗יו אַתָּ֤ה זָקַ֙נְתָּה֙ בָּ֣אתָ בַיָּמִ֔ים וְהָאָ֛רֶץ נִשְׁאֲרָ֥ה הַרְבֵּֽה־מְאֹ֖ד לְרִשְׁתָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Joshua was old, and far advanced in years, and the Lord said to him: Thou art grown old, and advanced in age, and there is a very large country left, which is not yet divided by lot:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Josua vanheni ja ijälliseksi tuli, sanoi Herra hänelle: sinä olet vanhentunut ja ijälliseksi tullut, ja maata on vielä aivan paljo jäänyt omistamata.
verses.king_james: Now Joshua was old and stricken in years; and the Lord said unto him, Thou art old and stricken in years, and there remaineth yet very much land to be possessed.

verses.latin_vulgate: omnis videlicet Galilæa, Philisthiim, et universa Gessuri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֥את הָאָ֖רֶץ הַנִּשְׁאָ֑רֶת כׇּל־גְּלִיל֥וֹת הַפְּלִשְׁתִּ֖ים וְכׇל־הַגְּשׁוּרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: To wit, all Galilee, Philistia, and all Gessuri.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on se jälellä oleva maa: kaikki Philistealaisten maan ääret ja koko Gessuri,
verses.king_james: This is the land that yet remaineth: all the borders of the Philistines, and all Geshuri,

verses.latin_vulgate: A fluvio turbido, qui irrigat Ægyptum, usque ad terminos Accaron contra aquilonem : terra Chanaan, quæ in quinque regulos Philisthiim dividitur, Gazæos, et Azotios, Ascalonitas, Gethæos, et Accaronitas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִֽן־הַשִּׁיח֞וֹר אֲשֶׁ֣ר ׀ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י מִצְרַ֗יִם וְעַ֨ד גְּב֤וּל עֶקְרוֹן֙ צָפ֔וֹנָה לַֽכְּנַעֲנִ֖י תֵּחָשֵׁ֑ב חֲמֵ֣שֶׁת ׀ סַרְנֵ֣י פְלִשְׁתִּ֗ים הָֽעַזָּתִ֤י וְהָֽאַשְׁדּוֹדִי֙ הָאֶשְׁקְלוֹנִ֣י הַגִּתִּ֔י וְהָעֶקְרוֹנִ֖י וְהָעַוִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: From the troubled river, that watereth Egypt, unto the border of Accaron northward: the land of Chanaan, which is divided among the lords of the Philistines, the Gazites, the Azotians, the Ascalonites, the Gethites, and the Accronites.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sihorista, joka juoksee Egyptin editse, Ekronin maan ääriin asti, pohjan puoleen, jotka luetaan Kanaanealaisille; ne viisi Philistealaisten päämiestä ovat: Gasilainen, Asdonilainen, Asklonilainen, Gatilainen, Ekronilainen ja Avilainen.
verses.king_james: From Sihor, which is before Egypt, even unto the borders of Ekron northward, which is counted to the Canaanite: five lords of the Philistines; the Gazathites, and the Ashdothites, the Eshkalonites, the Gittites, and the Ekronites; also the Avites:

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad meridiem vero sunt Hevæi, omnis terra Chanaan, et Maara Sidoniorum, usque Apheca et terminos Amorrhæi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִתֵּימָ֞ן כׇּל־אֶ֣רֶץ הַֽכְּנַעֲנִ֗י וּמְעָרָ֛ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר לַצִּידֹנִ֖ים עַד־אֲפֵ֑קָה עַ֖ד גְּב֥וּל הָאֱמֹרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And on the south side are the Hevites, all the land of Chanaan, and Maara of the Sidonians as far as Apheca, and the borders of the Amorrhite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta eteläänpäin ovat kaikki Kanaanealaisten maat ja Meara, joka on Zidonilaisten, Aphekiin saakka ja hamaan Amorilaisten maan ääriin asti,
verses.king_james: From the south, all the land of the Canaanites, and Mearah that is beside the Sidonians, unto Aphek, to the borders of the Amorites:

verses.latin_vulgate: ejusque confinia. Libani quoque regio contra orientem, a Baalgad sub monte Hermon, donec ingrediaris Emath ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָאָ֣רֶץ הַגִּבְלִ֗י וְכׇל־הַלְּבָנוֹן֙ מִזְרַ֣ח הַשֶּׁ֔מֶשׁ מִבַּ֣עַל גָּ֔ד תַּ֖חַת הַר־חֶרְמ֑וֹן עַ֖ד לְב֥וֹא חֲמָֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And his confines. The country also of Libanus towards the east from Baalgad under mount Hermon to the entering into Emath.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja myös Gibiläisten maa, ja koko Libanon auringon nousemiseen päin, BaalGadista Hermonin vuoren alta, siihenasti kuin Hamatiin tullaan.
verses.king_james: And the land of the Giblites, and all Lebanon, toward the sunrising, from Baal–gad under mount Hermon unto the entering into Hamath.

verses.latin_vulgate: omnium qui habitant in monte a Libano usque ad aquas Maserephoth, universique Sidonii. Ego sum qui delebo eos a facie filiorum Israël. Veniat ergo in partem hæreditatis Israël, sicut præcepi tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־יֹשְׁבֵ֣י הָ֠הָ֠ר מִֽן־הַלְּבָנ֞וֹן עַד־מִשְׂרְפֹ֥ת מַ֙יִם֙ כׇּל־צִ֣ידֹנִ֔ים אָֽנֹכִי֙ אֽוֹרִישֵׁ֔ם מִפְּנֵ֖י בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל רַ֠ק הַפִּלֶ֤הָ לְיִשְׂרָאֵל֙ בְּֽנַחֲלָ֔ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֖ר צִוִּיתִֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of all that dwell in the mountains from Libanus, to the waters of Maserephoth, and all the Sidonians. I am he that will cut them off from before the face of the children of Israel. So let their land come in as a part of the inheritance of Israel, as I have commanded thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki jotka vuorella asuvat, Libanonista lämpimään veteen asti, ja kaikki Zidonilaiset: minä ajan ne Israelin lasten edestä pois; ainoasti jaa ne Israelille perimiseksi, niinkuin minä olen sinulle käskenyt.
verses.king_james: All the inhabitants of the hill country from Lebanon unto Misrephoth–maim, and all the Sidonians, them will I drive out from before the children of Israel: only divide thou it by lot unto the Israelites for an inheritance, as I have commanded thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc divide terram in possessionem novem tribubus, et dimidiæ tribui Manasse,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה חַלֵּ֞ק אֶת־הָאָ֧רֶץ הַזֹּ֛את בְּנַחֲלָ֖ה לְתִשְׁעַ֣ת הַשְּׁבָטִ֑ים וַֽחֲצִ֖י הַשֵּׁ֥בֶט הַֽמְנַשֶּֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And now divide the land in possession to the nine tribes, and to the half tribe of Manasses,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin jaa nyt tämä maa yhdeksän sukukunnan välillä perimiseksi, ja puolelle Manassen sukukunnalle.
verses.king_james: Now therefore divide this land for an inheritance unto the nine tribes, and the half tribe of Manasseh,

verses.latin_vulgate: cum qua Ruben et Gad possederunt terram, quam tradidit eis Moyses famulus Domini trans fluenta Jordanis, ad orientalem plagam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עִמּ֗וֹ הָרֽאוּבֵנִי֙ וְהַגָּדִ֔י לָקְח֖וּ נַחֲלָתָ֑ם אֲשֶׁר֩ נָתַ֨ן לָהֶ֜ם מֹשֶׁ֗ה בְּעֵ֤בֶר הַיַּרְדֵּן֙ מִזְרָ֔חָה כַּֽאֲשֶׁר֙ נָתַ֣ן לָהֶ֔ם מֹשֶׁ֖ה עֶ֥בֶד יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: With whom Ruben and Gad have possessed the land, which Moses the servant of the Lord delivered to them beyond the river Jordan, on the east side.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Rubenilaiset ja Gadilaiset ovat toisen puolen Manassen sukukunnan kanssa saaneet perimisensä, jonka Moses heille oli antanut sillä puolella Jordania itään päin, niinkuin Herran palvelia Moses heille sen antanut oli:
verses.king_james: With whom the Reubenites and the Gadites have received their inheritance, which Moses gave them, beyond Jordan eastward, even as Moses the servant of the Lord gave them;

verses.latin_vulgate: Ab Aroër, quæ sita est in ripa torrentis Arnon, et in vallis medio, universaque campestria Medaba, usque Dibon,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵעֲרוֹעֵ֡ר אֲשֶׁר֩ עַל־שְׂפַת־נַ֨חַל אַרְנ֜וֹן וְהָעִ֨יר אֲשֶׁ֧ר בְּתוֹךְ־הַנַּ֛חַל וְכׇל־הַמִּישֹׁ֥ר מֵידְבָ֖א עַד־דִּיבֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: From Aroer, which is upon the bank of the torrent Arnon, and in the midst of the valley and all the plains of Medaba, as far as Dibon:
verses.finnish_biblia: Aroerista, joka on Arnonin ojan reunalla, ja siitä kaupungista, joka on ojan keskellä, ja koko Medeban lakeuden Diboniin asti,
verses.king_james: From Aroer, that is upon the bank of the river Arnon, and the city that is in the midst of the river, and all the plain of Medeba unto Dibon;

verses.latin_vulgate: et cunctas civitates Sehon regis Amorrhæi, qui regnavit in Hesebon, usque ad terminos filiorum Ammon,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכֹ֗ל עָרֵי֙ סִיחוֹן֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ הָאֱמֹרִ֔י אֲשֶׁ֥ר מָלַ֖ךְ בְּחֶשְׁבּ֑וֹן עַד־גְּב֖וּל בְּנֵ֥י עַמּֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the cities of Sehon, king of the Amorrhites, who reigned in Hesebon, unto the borders of the children of Ammon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikki Sihonin Amorilaisten kuninkaan kaupungit, joka hallitsi Hesbonissa, Ammonin lasten maan rajoihin asti,
verses.king_james: And all the cities of Sihon king of the Amorites, which reigned in Heshbon, unto the border of the children of Ammon;

verses.latin_vulgate: et Galaad, ac terminum Gessuri et Machati, et omnem montem Hermon, et universam Basan, usque ad Salecha,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַגִּלְעָ֞ד וּגְב֧וּל הַגְּשׁוּרִ֣י וְהַמַּעֲכָתִ֗י וְכֹ֨ל הַ֥ר חֶרְמ֛וֹן וְכׇל־הַבָּשָׁ֖ן עַד־סַלְכָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Galaad, and the borders of Gessuri and Machati, and all mount Hermon, and all Basan as far as Salecha,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Gileadin ja Gessurin ja Maakatin maan ääret, ja koko Hermonin vuoren, ja koko Basanin Salkaan asti;
verses.king_james: And Gilead, and the border of the Geshurites and Maachathites, and all mount Hermon, and all Bashan unto Salcah;

verses.latin_vulgate: omne regnum Og in Basan, qui regnavit in Astaroth et Edrai, ipse fuit de reliquiis Raphaim : percussitque eos Moyses, atque delevit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־מַמְלְכ֥וּת עוֹג֙ בַּבָּשָׁ֔ן אֲשֶׁר־מָלַ֥ךְ בְּעַשְׁתָּר֖וֹת וּבְאֶדְרֶ֑עִי ה֤וּא נִשְׁאַר֙ מִיֶּ֣תֶר הָרְפָאִ֔ים וַיַּכֵּ֥ם מֹשֶׁ֖ה וַיֹּרִשֵֽׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: All the kingdom of Og in Basan, who reigned in Astaroth and Edrai, he was of the remains of the Raphaims: and Moses overthrew and destroyed them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Koko Ogin Basanin kuninkaan valtakunnan, joka hallitsi Astarotissa ja Edreissä, joka vielä jäänyt oli uljaista, ja Moses löi heitä ja ajoi heitä pois.
verses.king_james: All the kingdom of Og in Bashan, which reigned in Ashtaroth and in Edrei, who remained of the remnant of the giants: for these did Moses smite, and cast them out.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nolueruntque disperdere filii Israël Gessuri et Machati : et habitaverunt in medio Israël usque in præsentem diem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹ֤א הוֹרִ֙ישׁוּ֙ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֶת־הַגְּשׁוּרִ֖י וְאֶת־הַמַּעֲכָתִ֑י וַיֵּ֨שֶׁב גְּשׁ֤וּר וּמַֽעֲכָת֙ בְּקֶ֣רֶב יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל עַ֖ד הַיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the children of Israel would not destroy Gessuri and Machati and they have dwelt in the midst of Israel, until this present day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Israelin lapset ei ajaneet Gessurilaisia ja Maakatilaisia ulos, vaan Gessurilainen ja Maakatilainen asuu Israelin lasten seassa tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: Nevertheless the children of Israel expelled not the Geshurites, nor the Maachathites: but the Geshurites and the Maachathites dwell among the Israelites until this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tribui autem Levi non dedit possessionem : sed sacrificia et victimæ Domini Dei Israël, ipsa est ejus hæreditas, sicut locutus est illi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֚ק לְשֵׁ֣בֶט הַלֵּוִ֔י לֹ֥א נָתַ֖ן נַחֲלָ֑ה אִשֵּׁ֨י יְהֹוָ֜ה אֱלֹהֵ֤י יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ ה֣וּא נַחֲלָת֔וֹ כַּאֲשֶׁ֖ר דִּבֶּר־לֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But to the tribe of Levi he gave no possession: but the sacrifices and victims of thee Lord God of Israel, are his inheritance, as he spoke to him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Leviläisten sukukunnalle ei hän antanut yhtään perimistä; sillä Herran Israelin Jumalan polttouhri on heidän perintönsä, niinkuin hän heille sanonut oli.
verses.king_james: Only unto the tribe of Levi he gave none inheritance; the sacrifices of the Lord God of Israel made by fire are their inheritance, as he said unto them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dedit ergo Moyses possessionem tribui filiorum Ruben juxta cognationes suas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֣ן מֹשֶׁ֔ה לְמַטֵּ֥ה בְנֵי־רְאוּבֵ֖ן לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses gave a possession to the children of Ruben according to their kindreds.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses antoi Rubenin lasten suvulle, heidän sukukuntainsa jälkeen:
verses.king_james: And Moses gave unto the tribe of the children of Reuben inheritance according to their families.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuitque terminus eorum ab Aroër, quæ sita est in ripa torrentis Arnon, et in valle ejusdem torrentis media : universam planitiem, quæ ducit Medaba,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֨י לָהֶ֜ם הַגְּב֗וּל מֵעֲרוֹעֵ֡ר אֲשֶׁר֩ עַל־שְׂפַת־נַ֨חַל אַרְנ֜וֹן וְהָעִ֨יר אֲשֶׁ֧ר בְּתוֹךְ־הַנַּ֛חַל וְכׇל־הַמִּישֹׁ֖ר עַל־מֵידְבָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And their border was from Aroer, which is on the bank of the torrent Arnon, and in the midst of the valley of the same torrent: all the plain, that leadeth to Medaba,
verses.finnish_biblia: Että heidän rajansa oli Aroerista, joka on Arnonin ojan reunalla, ja se kaupunki ojan keskellä kaiken sen tasaisen kedon kanssa Medeban tykönä;
verses.king_james: And their coast was from Aroer, that is on the bank of the river Arnon, and the city that is in the midst of the river, and all the plain by Medeba;

verses.latin_vulgate: et Hesebon, cunctosque viculos earum, qui sunt in campestribus : Dibon quoque et Bamothbaal, et oppidum Baalmaon,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֶשְׁבּ֥וֹן וְכׇל־עָרֶ֖יהָ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּמִּישֹׁ֑ר דִּיבֹן֙ וּבָמ֣וֹת בַּ֔עַל וּבֵ֖ית בַּ֥עַל מְעֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Hesebon, and all their villages, which are in the plains. Dibon also, and Bamothbaal, and the town of Baalmaon,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hesbonin kaupunkeinensa, jotka ovat tasaisella kedolla: Dibonin, BamotBaalin ja BetBaalMeonin,
verses.king_james: Heshbon, and all her cities that are in the plain; Dibon, and Bamoth–baal, and Beth–baal–meon,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Jassa, et Cedimoth, et Mephaath,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיַ֥הְצָה וּקְדֵמֹ֖ת וּמֵפָֽעַת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Jassa, and Cidimoth, and Mephaath,
verses.finnish_biblia: Jaksan, Kedemotin, Mephaotin,
verses.king_james: And Jahazah, and Kedemoth, and Mephaath,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Cariathaim, et Sabama, et Sarathasar in monte convallis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקִרְיָתַ֣יִם וְשִׂבְמָ֔ה וְצֶ֥רֶת הַשַּׁ֖חַר בְּהַ֥ר הָעֵֽמֶק׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Cariathaim, and Sabama, and Sarathasar in the mountain of the valley.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kirjataimin, Sibman, Zeretin, Saharin laakson, vuorilla,
verses.king_james: And Kirjathaim, and Sibmah, and Zareth–shahar in the mount of the valley,

verses.latin_vulgate: Bethphogor et Asedoth, Phasga et Bethiesimoth,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבֵ֥ית פְּע֛וֹר וְאַשְׁדּ֥וֹת הַפִּסְגָּ֖ה וּבֵ֥ית הַיְשִׁמֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Bethphogor and Asedoth, Phasga and Bethiesimoth,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja BetPeorin, ne ojat Pisgan tykönä ja BetJesimotin,
verses.king_james: And Beth–peor, and Ashdoth–pisgah, and Beth–jeshimoth,

verses.latin_vulgate: et omnes urbes campestres, universaque regna Sehon regis Amorrhæi, qui regnavit in Hesebon, quem percussit Moyses cum principibus Madian : Hevæum, et Recem, et Sur, et Hur, et Rebe duces Sehon habitatores terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכֹל֙ עָרֵ֣י הַמִּישֹׁ֔ר וְכׇֽל־מַמְלְכ֗וּת סִיחוֹן֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ הָאֱמֹרִ֔י אֲשֶׁ֥ר מָלַ֖ךְ בְּחֶשְׁבּ֑וֹן אֲשֶׁר֩ הִכָּ֨ה מֹשֶׁ֜ה אֹת֣וֹ ׀ וְאֶת־נְשִׂיאֵ֣י מִדְיָ֗ן אֶת־אֱוִ֤י וְאֶת־רֶ֙קֶם֙ וְאֶת־צ֤וּר וְאֶת־חוּר֙ וְאֶת־רֶ֔בַע נְסִיכֵ֣י סִיח֔וֹן יֹשְׁבֵ֖י הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the cities of the plain, and all the kingdoms of Sehon king of the Amorrhites, that reigned in Hesebon, whom Moses slew with the princes of Madian: Hevi, and Recem, and Sur and Hur, and Rebe, dukes of Sehon inhabitants of the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikki lakeuden kaupungit, ja koko Sihonin, Amorilaisten kuninkaan valtakunnan, joka hallitsi Hesbonissa, jonka Moses löi, niin myös Midianin päämiehet: Evin, Rekemin, Zurin, Hurin ja Reban, Sihonin päämiehet, jotka maassa asuivat.
verses.king_james: And all the cities of the plain, and all the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites, which reigned in Heshbon, whom Moses smote with the princes of Midian, Evi, and Rekem, and Zur, and Hur, and Reba, which were dukes of Sihon, dwelling in the country.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Balaam filium Beor ariolum occiderunt filii Israël gladio cum ceteris interfectis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־בִּלְעָ֥ם בֶּן־בְּע֖וֹר הַקּוֹסֵ֑ם הָרְג֧וּ בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל בַּחֶ֖רֶב אֶל־חַלְלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Balaam also the son of Beor the soothsayer, the children of Israel slew with the sword among the rest that were slain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Bileaminkin Beorin pojan, tietäjän, Israelin lapset miekalla kuoliaaksi löivät muita tapettaessa.
verses.king_james: Balaam also the son of Beor, the soothsayer, did the children of Israel slay with the sword among them that were slain by them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Factusque est terminus filiorum Ruben Jordanis fluvius. Hæc est possessio Rubenitarum per cognationes suas urbium et viculorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י גְּבוּל֙ בְּנֵ֣י רְאוּבֵ֔ן הַיַּרְדֵּ֖ן וּגְב֑וּל זֹ֣את נַחֲלַ֤ת בְּנֵֽי־רְאוּבֵן֙ לְמִשְׁפְּחוֹתָ֔ם הֶעָרִ֖ים וְחַצְרֵיהֶֽן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the river Jordan was the border of the children of Ruben. This is the possession of the Rubenites, by their kindreds, of cities and villages.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Rubenin lasten raja oli Jordani rajoinensa. Tämä on Rubenin lasten perimys heidän sukukuntainsa, kaupunkeinsa ja kyläinsä jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And the border of the children of Reuben was Jordan, and the border thereof. This was the inheritance of the children of Reuben after their families, the cities and the villages thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deditque Moyses tribui Gad et filiis ejus per cognationes suas possessionem, cujus hæc divisio est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֤ן מֹשֶׁה֙ לְמַטֵּה־גָ֔ד לִבְנֵי־גָ֖ד לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses gave to the tribe of Gad and to his children by their kindreds a possession, of which this is the division.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses antoi Gadin lasten sukukunnalle heidän sukukuntainsa jälkeen,
verses.king_james: And Moses gave inheritance unto the tribe of Gad, even unto the children of Gad according to their families.

verses.latin_vulgate: Terminus Jaser, et omnes civitates Galaad, et dimidiam partem terræ filiorum Ammon, usque ad Aroër, quæ est contra Rabba,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֤י לָהֶם֙ הַגְּב֔וּל יַעְזֵר֙ וְכׇל־עָרֵ֣י הַגִּלְעָ֔ד וַחֲצִ֕י אֶ֖רֶץ בְּנֵ֣י עַמּ֑וֹן עַד־עֲרוֹעֵ֕ר אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־פְּנֵ֥י רַבָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The border of Jaser, and all the cities of Galaad, and half the land of the children of Ammon: as far as Aroer which is over against Rabba:
verses.finnish_biblia: Että heidän rajansa oli Jaeser, ja kaikki Gileadin kaupungit, ja puoli Ammonin lasten maata, Aroeriin asti, joka on Rabban kohdalla,
verses.king_james: And their coast was Jazer, and all the cities of Gilead, and half the land of the children of Ammon, unto Aroer that is before Rabbah;

verses.latin_vulgate: et ab Hesebon usque Ramoth, Masphe et Betonim : et a Manaim usque ad terminos Dabir.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמֵחֶשְׁבּ֛וֹן עַד־רָמַ֥ת הַמִּצְפֶּ֖ה וּבְטֹנִ֑ים וּמִֽמַּחֲנַ֖יִם עַד־גְּב֥וּל לִדְבִֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And from Hesebon unto Ramoth, Masphe and Betonim: and from Manaim unto the borders of Dabir.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Hesbonista RamatMitspeen ja Betoniimiin asti, ja Mahanaimista Debirin rajaan asti,
verses.king_james: And from Heshbon unto Ramath–mizpeh, and Betonim; and from Mahanaim unto the border of Debir;

verses.latin_vulgate: In valle quoque Betharan, et Bethnemra, et Socoth, et Saphon reliquam partem regni Sehon regis Hesebon : hujus quoque finis, Jordanis est, usque ad extremam partem maris Cenereth trans Jordanem ad orientalem plagam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָעֵ֡מֶק בֵּ֣ית הָרָם֩ וּבֵ֨ית נִמְרָ֜ה וְסֻכּ֣וֹת וְצָפ֗וֹן יֶ֚תֶר מַמְלְכ֗וּת סִיחוֹן֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ חֶשְׁבּ֔וֹן הַיַּרְדֵּ֖ן וּגְבֻ֑ל עַד־קְצֵה֙ יָם־כִּנֶּ֔רֶת עֵ֥בֶר הַיַּרְדֵּ֖ן מִזְרָֽחָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And in the valley Betharan and Bethnemra, and Socoth, and Saphon the other part of the kingdom of Sehon king of Hesebon: the limit of this also is the Jordan, as far as the uttermost part of the sea of Cenereth beyond the Jordan on the east side,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja laaksossa Betaram ja BetNimra, Sukkot ja Zaphon, joka jäi Sihonin Hesbonin kuninkaan valtakunnasta; joiden raja oli Jordani Kinneretin meren ääreen asti, toisella puolella Jordania itään päin.
verses.king_james: And in the valley, Beth–aram, and Beth–nimrah, and Succoth, and Zaphon, the rest of the kingdom of Sihon king of Heshbon, Jordan and his border, even unto the edge of the sea of Chinnereth on the other side Jordan eastward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est possessio filiorum Gad per familias suas, civitates et villæ earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֛את נַחֲלַ֥ת בְּנֵי־גָ֖ד לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֑ם הֶעָרִ֖ים וְחַצְרֵיהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: This is the possession of the children of Gad by their families, their cities, and villages.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on Gadin lasten perimys heidän sukukunnissansa, kaupungeissansa ja kylissänsä.
verses.king_james: This is the inheritance of the children of Gad after their families, the cities, and their villages.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dedit et dimidiæ tribui Manasse, filiisque ejus juxta cognationes suas, possessionem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֣ן מֹשֶׁ֔ה לַחֲצִ֖י שֵׁ֣בֶט מְנַשֶּׁ֑ה וַיְהִ֗י לַחֲצִ֛י מַטֵּ֥ה בְנֵי־מְנַשֶּׁ֖ה לְמִשְׁפְּחוֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He gave also to the half tribe of Manasses and his children possession according to their kindreds,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses antoi puolelle Manassen lasten suvulle sen mikä puolelle Manassen sukukunnalle tuli, heidän sukukuntainsa jälkeen,
verses.king_james: And Moses gave inheritance unto the half tribe of Manasseh: and this was the possession of the half tribe of the children of Manasseh by their families.

verses.latin_vulgate: cujus hoc principium est : a Manaim universam Basan, et cuncta regna Og regis Basan, omnesque vicos Jair, qui sunt in Basan, sexaginta oppida :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י גְבוּלָ֗ם מִמַּחֲנַ֨יִם כׇּֽל־הַבָּשָׁ֜ן כׇּֽל־מַמְלְכ֣וּת ׀ ע֣וֹג מֶֽלֶךְ־הַבָּשָׁ֗ן וְכׇל־חַוֺּ֥ת יָאִ֛יר אֲשֶׁ֥ר בַּבָּשָׁ֖ן שִׁשִּׁ֥ים עִֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The beginning whereof is this: from Manaim all Basan, and all the kingdoms of Og king of Basan, and all the villages of Jair, which are in Basan, threescore towns.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että heidän rajansa oli Mahanaimista koko Basan, koko Ogin Basanin kuninkaan valtakunta ja kaikki Jairin kylät, jotka ovat Basanissa, kuusikymmentä kaupunkia,
verses.king_james: And their coast was from Mahanaim, all Bashan, all the kingdom of Og king of Bashan, and all the towns of Jair, which are in Bashan, threescore cities:

verses.latin_vulgate: et dimidiam partem Galaad, et Astaroth, et Edrai, urbes regni Og in Basan : filiis Machir, filii Manasse, dimidiæ parti filiorum Machir juxta cognationes suas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַחֲצִ֤י הַגִּלְעָד֙ וְעַשְׁתָּר֣וֹת וְאֶדְרֶ֔עִי עָרֵ֛י מַמְלְכ֥וּת ע֖וֹג בַּבָּשָׁ֑ן לִבְנֵ֤י מָכִיר֙ בֶּן־מְנַשֶּׁ֔ה לַחֲצִ֥י בְנֵֽי־מָכִ֖יר לְמִשְׁפְּחוֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And half Galaad, and Astaroth, and Edrai, cities of the kingdom of Og in Basan: to the children of Machir, the son of Manasses, to one half of the children of Machir according to their kindreds.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja puolen Gileadia ja Astarotia, Edreiä Ogin valtakunnan kaupungit Basanissa (antoi hän) Makirin Manassen pojan lapsille, toiselle puolelle Makirin lapsia heidän sukukuntainsa jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And half Gilead, and Ashtaroth, and Edrei, cities of the kingdom of Og in Bashan, were pertaining unto the children of Machir the son of Manasseh, even to the one half of the children of Machir by their families.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hanc possessionem divisit Moyses in campestribus Moab trans Jordanem contra Jericho ad orientalem plagam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֕לֶּה אֲשֶׁר־נִחַ֥ל מֹשֶׁ֖ה בְּעַֽרְב֣וֹת מוֹאָ֑ב מֵעֵ֛בֶר לְיַרְדֵּ֥ן יְרִיח֖וֹ מִזְרָֽחָה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: This possession Moses divided in the plains of Moab, beyond the Jordan, over against Jericho on the east side,
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on se minkä Moses antoi Moabin kedoilla, sillä puolella Jordania, Jerihon kohdalla itään päin.
verses.king_james: These are the countries which Moses did distribute for inheritance in the plains of Moab, on the other side Jordan, by Jericho, eastward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tribui autem Levi non dedit possessionem : quoniam Dominus Deus Israël ipse est possessio ejus, ut locutus est illi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְשֵׁ֙בֶט֙ הַלֵּוִ֔י לֹא־נָתַ֥ן מֹשֶׁ֖ה נַחֲלָ֑ה יְהֹוָ֞ה אֱלֹהֵ֤י יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ ה֣וּא נַחֲלָתָ֔ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֖ר דִּבֶּ֥ר לָהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: But to the tribe of Levi he gave no possession: because the Lord the God of Israel himself is their possession, as he spoke to them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Levin sukukunnalle ei antanut Moses yhtään perimystä; Herra Israelin Jumala on heidän perimisensä, niinkuin hän heille sanonut oli.
verses.king_james: But unto the tribe of Levi Moses gave not any inheritance: the Lord God of Israel was their inheritance, as he said unto them.
